name: ExtensionImagingStudy_PartOf
title: R5: Part of referenced event (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImagingStudy.partOf` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImagingStudy.partOf` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Procedure)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ImagingStudy.partOf` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Procedure)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImagingStudy.partOf` has a context of ImagingStudy based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ImagingStudy`.
Element `ImagingStudy.partOf` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `ImagingStudy.partOf` has a context of ImagingStudy based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ImagingStudy`.
Element `ImagingStudy.partOf` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
To link an ImagingStudy to an Encounter use `encounter`.

element.definition: A larger event of which this particular ImagingStudy is a component or step.  For example,  an ImagingStudy as part of a procedure.
element.comment: To link an ImagingStudy to an Encounter use `encounter`.
